stream_format: if payload_byte_count != 0: u16 apu_destination, then payload_byte_count bytes
if payload_byte_count == 0: terminal handshake with destination $0500; no payload follows
loader_contract.cold_start_bootstrap: InitializeMusicSubsystem loads MusicDatasetTable row 0 sequence_pack, stores it as CurrentSecondarySamplePack/Unknown7EB543, then ChangeMusic applies the requested track.
loader_contract.load_order: CHANGE_MUSIC loads primary sample pack, secondary sample pack, then sequence pack when changed and not $FF.

tracks.name: NONE
notes: Track 0 is not indexed into MusicDatasetTable by CHANGE_MUSIC.

renderer_backends.license_policy: ISC/permissive candidate; review third-party notices before vendoring.
renderer_backends.role: accuracy-first runtime/capture harness and future differential oracle

renderer_backends.license_policy: LGPL-2.1; use as lightweight SPC snapshot renderer with compliance notes.
renderer_backends.role: lightweight SPC snapshot renderer for local WAV export once snapshots are generated

renderer_backends.license_policy: GPL/noncommercial tools stay optional and out-of-process.
renderer_backends.role: bsnes/higan, Mesen2, or Mednafen comparison/export checks
